text: i feel so dirty but after spending a day at the mk show me and a buddy decided we would get the two player starter between us luckily for us both i liked the everblight and he liked the circle maybe a tad to much so it all worked out well
i could feel his breath on me and smell the sweet scent of him
i just want to feel loved by you

at a party i met a girl who drew me to her

i always feel sympathetic for those that do as well because life can be really hard on you sometimes when you do have alot of pride
